title: SectionSynthesis
description: Structured synthesis notes for one review section, used as input to the drafting stage

core_claims.description: 3–5 key claims supported by papers in this section

method_groups.description: Groups of methods or approaches, each containing the papers that use them

controversies.description: Disagreements or debates in the literature

evidence_gaps.description: What is unknown, understudied, or not covered by available abstracts

representative_refs.description: The most important paper_ids to cite in this section (5–10 recommended)

word_count_target.description: Target word count for this section's prose
